title: Hut 8 Mining Statistics 2025: Power, Profit, and Growth
text: Hut 8 Mining Statistics and Operational Metrics. Q3 2025 Hash Rate: Installed 26.8 EH/s, Operational 23.7 EH/s. Fleet Efficiency: 16.3 J/TH by September 2025. Bitcoin Holdings: 13,696 BTC valued at approximately $1.6 billion as of September 30, 2025, up 50% from 2024. Energy Infrastructure: 1,020 MW operational capacity with 10,800 MW development pipeline. Four new U.S. sites totaling 1,530 MW expansion capacity announced. Platforms expected to exceed 2.5 GW across 19 sites. Q3 2025 Financial: Revenue $83.5 million (91% YoY increase), Net income $50.6 million (vs. $0.9 million prior year). Fleet Expansion: Q1 2025 deployed hash rate surged 102% from February to March (4.6 EH/s to 9.3 EH/s), fleet efficiency improved 31% same period. Strategic positioning as top 10 public company by Bitcoin treasury size.
